lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੭ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 ghar 7 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Seventh House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਮਹਾ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਾਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kal kales lobh moh mahaa bhaujal taare | rahaau |
lines.english: He shall save you from strife, suffering, greed, attachment, and the most terrifying world-ocean. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har ek simar ek simar ek simar piaare |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the One Lord; meditate in remembrance on the One Lord; meditate in remembrance on the One Lord, O my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ਗੁਨ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal namasakaar gun gobid beechaare |
lines.english: Worship His lotus feet, and contemplate the glorious virtues of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗ ਜਪਿ ਨਿਸੰਗ ਮਨਿ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਧਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasang jap nisang man nidhaan dhaare |1|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate on Him fearlessly, and enshrine the treasure of His Name in your mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਨਿਮਖ ਨਿਮਖ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਚਿਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas nimakh nimakh dinas rain chitaare |
lines.english: With each and every breath, each and every instant, day and night, dwell upon Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਰੇਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੰਗਲ ਸੂਖ ਸਧਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੧॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa kee ren naanak mangal sookh sadhaare |2|1|31|
lines.english: O Nanak, the dust of the feet of the Holy shall bless you with pleasure and peace. ||2||1||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੮ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 ghar 8 dupade |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Eighth House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਲੋਕਿ ਪਰਲੋਕਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਜਤ ਕਤ ਮੋਹਿ ਰਖਵਾਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eih lok paralok sang sahaaee jat kat mohi rakhavaale |1|
lines.english: In this world, and in the world beyond, He is with me, as my help and support; wherever I go, He protects me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਉ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: simrau simar simar sukh paavau saas saas samaale |
lines.english: Remembering, remembering, remembering Him in meditation, I find peace; with each and every breath, I dwell upon Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਬਚਨੁ ਬਸੈ ਜੀਅ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa bachan basai jeea naale |
lines.english: The Guru's Word abides with my soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਨਹੀ ਡੂਬੈ ਤਸਕਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਲੇਵੈ ਭਾਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਜਾਲੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jal nahee ddoobai tasakar nahee levai bhaeh na saakai jaale |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It does not sink in water; thieves cannot steal it, and fire cannot burn it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰ ਮਹਿ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੇ ॥੨॥੧॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: saagar meh bohith paaeo har naanak karee kripaa kirapaale |2|1|32|
lines.english: In the ocean of the world, I have found the boat of the Lord; the Merciful Lord has bestowed His Mercy upon Nanak. ||2||1||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਧਨ ਕਉ ਧਨੁ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਕਉ ਟਿਕ ਮਾਤ ਦੂਧੁ ਜੈਸੇ ਬਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: niradhan kau dhan andhule kau ttik maat doodh jaise baale |
lines.english: It is like wealth to the poor, a cane for the blind, and mother's milk for the infant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਿੰਚਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal deaal gobindaa amrit ridai sinchaaee |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe has become kind and merciful; His Ambrosial Nectar permeates my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕਉ ਅਨਦੁ ਸਗਲ ਹੀ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: santan kau anad sagal hee jaaee |
lines.english: The Saints are in ecstasy everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹੀ ਜਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nav nidh ridh sidh har laag rahee jan paaee |1|
lines.english: The nine treasures, riches and the miraculous spiritual powers of the Siddhas cling to the feet of the Lord's humble servant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਾ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਠਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: grihi baahar tthaakur bhagatan kaa rav rahiaa srab tthaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Within the home, and outside as well, the Lord and Master of His devotees is totally pervading and permeating everywhere. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਮਿਟੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੨॥੨॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: jam kee traas mittai jis simarat naanak naam dhiaaee |2|2|33|
lines.english: The fear of the Messenger of Death is eradicated, remembering Him in meditation; Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||2||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਹੁਚਨਹਾਰਾ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅੰਗਿ ਗੁਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kau koe na pahuchanahaaraa jaa kai ang gusaaee |
lines.english: No one can equal one who has the Lord of the Universe on his side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਜਾਨੈ ਸਗਲ ਰਾਜੁ ਹਮਰਾ ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਟੇਕ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raajaa jaanai sagal raaj hamaraa tiau har jan ttek suaamee |1|
lines.english: The king believes that the whole kingdom belongs to him; in the same way, the humble servant of the Lord looks upon the support of his Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਬਵੰਤੁ ਦਰਬੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਗਰਬੈ ਭੂਮਵੰਤੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: darabavant darab dekh garabai bhoomavant abhimaanee |
lines.english: The rich man gazes upon his riches, and is proud of himself; the landlord takes pride in his lands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋਊ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਓਟ ਸਮਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: je koaoo apunee ott samaarai |
lines.english: When one considers the Lord to be his only support,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਬਿਤੁ ਤੈਸਾ ਹੋਇ ਵਰਤੈ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਬਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਹਾਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa bit taisaa hoe varatai apunaa bal nahee haarai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: then the Lord uses His power to help him; this power cannot be defeated. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਭਏ ਇਕ ਆਸਰ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਰਣਿ ਕਰਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: aan tiaag bhe ik aasar saran saran kar aae |
lines.english: Renouncing all others, I have sought the Support of the One Lord; I have come to Him, pleading, "Save me, save me!"

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹ ਭਏ ਮਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ॥੨॥੩॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: sant anugrah bhe man niramal naanak har gun gaae |2|3|34|
lines.english: By the kindness and the Grace of the Saints, my mind has been purified; Nanak sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||3||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਜਿਣੈ ਸਗਲ ਵਸਿ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aatam jinai sagal vas taa kai jaa kaa satigur pooraa |1|
lines.english: Through the Perfect True Guru, he conquers his own soul, and then everything comes under his control. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਗੋ ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਸੋ ਕਹੀਅਤ ਹੈ ਸੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau har rang laago is jug meh so kaheeat hai sooraa |
lines.english: He alone is called a warrior, who is attached to the Lord's Love in this age.
